name: onipin
description: Talk to OniPin businesses (onp_ pins): catalog, chat, bookings and order requests via the public OniPin API.
long_description: OniPin connects Claude to businesses that publish an onp_ pin. Look up a business, browse its catalog, chat with its AI, request bookings, or create order requests. This Desktop Extension is a thin local MCP client; all data and processing happen on the public OniPin API (default https://onnivers.store). It does not include the OniPin platform source code.

tools.name: descubrir_url
tools.description: Resolve an OniPin pin from a website URL

tools.name: buscar_negocio
tools.description: Look up a business by pin

prompts.name: atender_como_cliente
prompts.description: Act as the customer's agent toward a business
prompts.text: Act as my representative with OniPin business pin {{pin}}. Goal: {{objetivo}}. Use buscar_negocio, obtener_catalogo, enviar_mensaje, crear_reserva or comprar_producto as needed, and leer_conversacion before concluding.

base_url.title: OniPin API base URL
base_url.description: Public OniPin API origin. Leave default unless you use a custom deployment.
